titleStmt.title: SII 9.175: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 175. (A.R. No. 518 of 1915.) ON A SLAB LYING NEAR THE MARISVAMI-MATHA AT CHINNATUMBALAM, ADONI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 32, Sarvajit, Pushya, puṇṇami, Maṅgaḷavāra, Sōma-grahaṇa corresponding to A.D. 1107 December, 31 Tuesday, when there was a lunar eclipse, and refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva. At the request of the Daṇḍanāyaka Śrīdharayya, the queen Malayamatīdēvī is stated to have made the following grants out of the revenue raised in the village Tumbuḷa:—gadyāṇas 8 to the teacher of commentaries, gadyāṇas 8 to the Purāṇa-reader, gadyāṇas 12 to the teacher of the khaṇḍikas of the Ṛigvēda and the Yajurvēda, gadyāṇas 2 to the keeper of the sacred fire; in all 30 gadyāṇas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha
mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭā
rakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ
śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijeyarājyamu
ttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkka
tāraṁbaraṁ saluttaṁ jayantīpurada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁ
kathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire svastyanavarataparama
kalyāṇābhyudayasahasraphaḷabhōgabhāgini dvitīya
lakṣmīsamāne kaḷahaṁsayāneyanavaratavittavitaraṇa
visiṣṭadīnānāthavaṁdibriṁdasaṁtarppaṇe pātramukhadarppaṇe
cāḷukyarāmarājyābhyudayaśubhaśūcanānēkaśu
bhalakṣaṇalakṣitāṁgi rāyasarbajñanardhdhāṁgi mridumadhu
ravacanaracanecaturakaḷāḷāpe gōtraratnapradīpe śrīma
tu piriyarasi tribhuvanamallapaṭṭamahādēvi malayamatī
dēviyaru śrīmaccāḷukyavikramakālada mūvatteraḍane
ya sarvvajitusaṁvatsarada puṣya puṇnami maṁ
gaḷavāradaṁdu sōmagrahaṇanimittadiṁ śrīdharayyada
ṇḍanāyakana binnapadiṁ siṁdavāḍi nāḍoḷage tammāḷkeya
grahāraṁ tuṁbuḷada mahājanaṁ nūranālvadiṁ
barggaṁ dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭa dharmmavā vūralu dharmmava
ttaḷeyāgi tiṟuva siddhāyada ponnoḷage vyākhyānadupā
dhyāyargge gadyāṇameṁṭu purāṇabhaṭṭargge gadyāṇaveṁṭu rigvē
dayajurvēdavanteraḍu khaṇḍikeyupādhyāyarge ga
dyāṇaṁ hanneraḍu Agniṣṭageya brāhmaṇaṁge gadyāṇavera
ḍu Antu gadyāṇaṁ mūvattu . sāmānyōyaṁ
dharmmasētuṁ nripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbiḥ
sarvvānētān bhāginaḥ pārtthivēndrān bhūyō
bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . svadattāṁ parada
ttāṁ vā yō harēta vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭiṁ varṣasa
hasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
svasti śrīmadagrahāraṁ tuṁbuḷadaśēṣamahājanaṁgaḷa kayyalu Aṟavaṁṭigege cakra
seṭṭi biḍisida mattaru 1 .
Digital edition of SII 9.175 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
